---
title: "Top-Risk Road Segments"
description: "Interactive screening map for the top 1% highest-risk road links."
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This page maps the global top 1% highest-risk road links after controlling for traffic exposure. The ranking uses `risk_percentile_eb`, the empirical-Bayes-adjusted production ranking field.

These links are screening candidates for inspection, mapping, portfolio review, and demo use. They are not causal proof, crash prediction guarantees, or engineering-audit results. Motorway calibration remains a known caveat, and sparse collision histories should be interpreted cautiously.

The map colours links by `log_predicted_eb = log1p(predicted_eb)` rather than by `risk_percentile_eb`, because the global top-1% percentile values are tightly compressed at the top end. The percentile rank remains available in each popup.

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css">
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>

<style>
  .risk-map-panel {
    border: 1px solid #d9dee7;
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #ffffff;
  }

  .risk-map-toolbar {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(180px, 1fr));
    gap: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.85rem;
    background: #f7f9fc;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #d9dee7;
    align-items: end;
  }

  .risk-map-toolbar label {
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.3rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #243447;
  }

  .risk-map-toolbar select,
  .risk-map-toolbar button {
    min-height: 2.3rem;
    border: 1px solid #b8c2d0;
    border-radius: 6px;
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #17202a;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
  }

  .risk-map-toolbar button {
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  #top-risk-map {
    height: 72vh;
    min-height: 520px;
    background: #eef2f5;
  }

  .risk-map-status {
    padding: 0.55rem 0.85rem;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #405064;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-top: 1px solid #d9dee7;
  }

  .risk-legend {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
    padding: 0.6rem 0.7rem;
    border: 1px solid #c8d0dc;
    border-radius: 6px;
    line-height: 1.35;
    color: #1f2933;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  }

  .risk-legend-gradient {
    width: 170px;
    height: 11px;
    margin: 0.35rem 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2c7bb6, #abd9e9, #ffffbf, #fdae61, #d7191c);
  }

  .risk-summary-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(240px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .risk-summary-grid table,
  #numeric-summary table {
    width: 100%;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
  }

  .risk-note {
    color: #526173;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
  }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .risk-map-toolbar,
    .risk-summary-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    #top-risk-map {
      height: 68vh;
      min-height: 420px;
    }
  }
</style>

## Interactive Map

<div class="risk-map-panel">
<div class="risk-map-toolbar" aria-label="Top-risk map filters"><label>Family <select id="family-filter"></select></label><label>Road archetype <select id="archetype-filter"></select></label><label>Road classification <select id="classification-filter"></select></label><button id="reset-filters" type="button">Reset filters</button></div>
<div id="top-risk-map"></div>
<div id="risk-map-status" class="risk-map-status">Loading static GeoJSON...</div>
</div>

<p class="risk-note">The map uses client-side filters over one static GeoJSON file. Only one selected value per grouping axis is supported at a time; this keeps the page GitHub-Pages-compatible without a Python backend or external data service.</p>

## Summary Tables

<div class="risk-summary-grid">
<div>
<h3>Count by family</h3>
<div id="family-summary"></div>
</div>
<div>
<h3>Count by road classification</h3>
<div id="classification-summary"></div>
</div>
<div>
<h3>Count by road archetype</h3>
<div id="archetype-summary"></div>
</div>
</div>

<h3>Numeric summary</h3>
<div id="numeric-summary"></div>

## Data Notes

- Source layer: `data/outputs/top_1pct_risk_segments.parquet`.
- Web layer: `data/outputs/web/top_1pct_risk_segments.geojson`.
- Context network layers: `data/outputs/web/context/context_manifest.json` plus split GeoJSON files.
  Motorway and trunk-A links are shown in full; `other_urban` and `other_rural`
  show the top context percentile by `risk_percentile_eb` recorded in the manifest.
- Features: 21,676 road links.
- GeoJSON size: 14,709,969 bytes.
- Geometry simplification: 25 m tolerance in EPSG:3857, then written as EPSG:4326 with coordinates rounded to 0.00001 degrees.
- Colour scaling: `log_predicted_eb = log1p(predicted_eb)`.
- Background map: OpenStreetMap tiles, with static project GeoJSON files for the risk and context layers.

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const REQUIRED_IDS = [
    "top-risk-map",
    "risk-map-status",
    "family-summary",
    "classification-summary",
    "archetype-summary",
    "numeric-summary",
    "family-filter",
    "archetype-filter",
    "classification-filter",
    "reset-filters"
  ];
  const elements = Object.fromEntries(
    REQUIRED_IDS.map((id) => [id, document.getElementById(id)])
  );

  function showPageError(message) {
    const target = elements["risk-map-status"] || document.querySelector("main") || document.body;
    const error = document.createElement("div");
    error.className = "risk-map-status";
    error.style.color = "#9f1d20";
    error.style.background = "#fff4f4";
    error.textContent = message;
    if (target === elements["risk-map-status"]) {
      target.textContent = message;
      target.style.color = "#9f1d20";
      target.style.background = "#fff4f4";
    } else {
      target.prepend(error);
    }
    console.error(message);
  }

  const missing = REQUIRED_IDS.filter((id) => !elements[id]);
  if (missing.length > 0) {
    showPageError(`Top-risk map cannot initialise: missing required page elements: ${missing.join(", ")}`);
    return;
  }

  if (!window.L) {
    showPageError("Top-risk map cannot initialise: Leaflet did not load.");
    return;
  }

  const DATA_URL = "../data/outputs/web/top_1pct_risk_segments.geojson";
  const META_URL = "../data/outputs/web/top_1pct_risk_segments_web_metadata.json";
  const CONTEXT_MANIFEST_URL = "../data/outputs/web/context/context_manifest.json";
  const CONTEXT_BASE_URL = "../data/outputs/web/context/";
  const CONTEXT_FAMILIES = new Set(["motorway", "trunk_a", "other_urban", "other_rural"]);
  const renderer = L.canvas({ padding: 0.35 });
  const map = L.map(elements["top-risk-map"], {
    renderer,
    zoomControl: true,
    preferCanvas: true,
    attributionControl: true
  }).setView([53.35, -1.3], 7);

  L.tileLayer("https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png", {
    maxZoom: 19,
    attribution: '&copy; <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright">OpenStreetMap</a> contributors'
  })
    .addTo(map);

  const status = elements["risk-map-status"];
  const filters = {
    family: elements["family-filter"],
    road_archetype: elements["archetype-filter"],
    road_classification: elements["classification-filter"]
  };
  const resetButton = elements["reset-filters"];

  let allFeatures = [];
  let currentHaloLayer = null;
  let currentLayer = null;
  let logMin = 0;
  let logMax = 1;
  let legendScaleLabel = null;

  const colors = ["#2c7bb6", "#abd9e9", "#ffffbf", "#fdae61", "#d7191c"];
  const contextStyles = {
    "motorway": { color: "#5a6b78", weight: 2.5, opacity: 0.55 },
    "trunk_a": { color: "#6b7d8a", weight: 2.0, opacity: 0.50 },
    "other_urban": { color: "#8a9baa", weight: 1.2, opacity: 0.35 },
    "other_rural": { color: "#a0adb8", weight: 1.0, opacity: 0.30 },
    "__default__": { color: "#b8c2cc", weight: 0.6, opacity: 0.20 }
  };

  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value ?? "")
      .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
      .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
      .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
      .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
      .replaceAll("'", "&#039;");
  }

  function formatNumber(value, digits = 0) {
    const num = Number(value);
    if (!Number.isFinite(num)) return "";
    return num.toLocaleString(undefined, {
      minimumFractionDigits: digits,
      maximumFractionDigits: digits
    });
  }

  function featureColor(feature) {
    const raw = Number(feature.properties.log_predicted_eb);
    const value = Number.isFinite(raw) ? raw : logMin;
    const t = Math.max(0, Math.min(0.9999, (value - logMin) / Math.max(logMax - logMin, 1e-9)));
    return colors[Math.floor(t * colors.length)];
  }

  function riskWeight(feature) {
    const rank = Number(feature.properties.global_risk_rank);
    if (Number.isFinite(rank) && rank <= 100) return 7.2;
    if (Number.isFinite(rank) && rank <= 1000) return 5.8;
    if (Number.isFinite(rank) && rank <= 5000) return 4.4;
    return 3.0;
  }

  function haloStyle(feature) {
    return {
      color: "#15202b",
      weight: riskWeight(feature) + 3.2,
      opacity: 0.66,
      lineCap: "round",
      lineJoin: "round"
    };
  }

  function featureStyle(feature) {
    return {
      color: featureColor(feature),
      weight: riskWeight(feature),
      opacity: 0.96,
      lineCap: "round",
      lineJoin: "round"
    };
  }

  function hoverStyle(feature) {
    return {
      color: "#ffe45c",
      weight: riskWeight(feature) + 3.0,
      opacity: 1.0,
      lineCap: "round",
      lineJoin: "round"
    };
  }

  function contextStyle(feature) {
    const family = feature.properties.family || "__default__";
    return contextStyles[family] || contextStyles.__default__;
  }

  function popupHtml(properties) {
    const fields = [
      ["Global risk rank", properties.global_risk_rank],
      ["Link ID", properties.link_id],
      ["Road classification", properties.road_classification],
      ["Road function", properties.road_function],
      ["Family", properties.family],
      ["Road archetype", properties.road_archetype],
      ["Form of way", properties.form_of_way],
      ["Collision count", properties.collision_count],
      ["Fatal count", properties.fatal_count],
      ["Serious count", properties.serious_count],
      ["Estimated AADT", formatNumber(properties.estimated_aadt, 1)],
      ["Link length km", formatNumber(properties.link_length_km, 3)],
      ["Predicted EB", formatNumber(properties.predicted_eb, 3)],
      ["Predicted XGB", formatNumber(properties.predicted_xgb, 3)],
      ["Risk percentile EB", formatNumber(properties.risk_percentile_eb, 3)],
      ["Calibration caveat", properties.calibration_caveat || "None flagged"]
    ];

    return `
      <div style="min-width: 260px">
        <strong>Top-risk road link</strong>
        <${"table"}>
          ${fields.map(([key, value]) => `
            <tr>
              <th style="text-align:left;padding-right:0.6rem;vertical-align:top">${escapeHtml(key)}</th>
              <td>${escapeHtml(value)}</td>
            </tr>
          `).join("")}
        </${"table"}>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function filteredFeatures() {
    return allFeatures.filter((feature) => {
      const props = feature.properties;
      return Object.entries(filters).every(([field, select]) => {
        return select.value === "__all__" || String(props[field] ?? "") === select.value;
      });
    });
  }

  function renderLayer() {
    const features = filteredFeatures();
    const visibleLogValues = features
      .map((feature) => Number(feature.properties.log_predicted_eb))
      .filter(Number.isFinite);
    if (visibleLogValues.length > 0) {
      logMin = Math.min(...visibleLogValues);
      logMax = Math.max(...visibleLogValues);
    } else {
      logMin = 0;
      logMax = 1;
    }
    const hasFilter = Object.values(filters).some((select) => select.value !== "__all__");
    if (legendScaleLabel) {
      legendScaleLabel.textContent = hasFilter
        ? "log1p(predicted EB) (filtered range)"
        : "log1p(predicted EB)";
    }

    if (currentHaloLayer) {
      map.removeLayer(currentHaloLayer);
    }
    if (currentLayer) {
      map.removeLayer(currentLayer);
    }

    currentHaloLayer = L.geoJSON(
      { type: "FeatureCollection", features },
      {
        renderer,
        style: haloStyle,
        interactive: false
      }
    ).addTo(map);

    currentLayer = L.geoJSON(
      { type: "FeatureCollection", features },
      {
        renderer,
        style: featureStyle,
        onEachFeature: (feature, layer) => {
          layer.bindPopup(popupHtml(feature.properties), { maxWidth: 420 });
          layer.on({
            mouseover: () => {
              layer.setStyle(hoverStyle(feature));
              layer.bringToFront();
            },
            mouseout: () => {
              currentLayer.resetStyle(layer);
            }
          });
        }
      }
    ).addTo(map);

    if (features.length > 0) {
      map.fitBounds(currentLayer.getBounds(), { padding: [18, 18], maxZoom: 13 });
    }

    status.textContent = `${features.length.toLocaleString()} of ${allFeatures.length.toLocaleString()} links shown`;
  }

  function populateFilter(select, features, field) {
    const values = [...new Set(features.map((feature) => String(feature.properties[field] ?? "Unknown")))]
      .filter(Boolean)
      .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b));
    select.innerHTML = `<option value="__all__">All</option>` +
      values.map((value) => `<option value="${escapeHtml(value)}">${escapeHtml(value)}</option>`).join("");
  }

  function countRows(counts) {
    const total = Object.values(counts).reduce((acc, value) => acc + Number(value), 0);
    return Object.entries(counts)
      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
      .map(([label, count]) => {
        const share = total ? (Number(count) / total * 100).toFixed(1) : "0.0";
        return `<tr><td>${escapeHtml(label)}</td><td>${formatNumber(count)}</td><td>${share}%</td></tr>`;
      })
      .join("");
  }

  function renderCountTable(elementId, labelHeader, counts) {
    elements[elementId].innerHTML = `
      <${"table"}>
        <thead><tr><th>${escapeHtml(labelHeader)}</th><th>count</th><th>share</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${countRows(counts)}</tbody>
      </${"table"}>
    `;
  }

  function renderNumericSummary(summary) {
    const rows = Object.entries(summary).map(([field, stats]) => `
      <tr>
        <td>${escapeHtml(field)}</td>
        <td>${formatNumber(stats.n)}</td>
        <td>${formatNumber(stats.min, 3)}</td>
        <td>${formatNumber(stats.median, 3)}</td>
        <td>${formatNumber(stats.mean, 3)}</td>
        <td>${formatNumber(stats.p90, 3)}</td>
        <td>${formatNumber(stats.max, 3)}</td>
      </tr>
    `).join("");

    elements["numeric-summary"].innerHTML = `
      <${"table"}>
        <thead>
          <tr><th>field</th><th>n</th><th>min</th><th>median</th><th>mean</th><th>p90</th><th>max</th></tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
      </${"table"}>
    `;
  }

  const legend = L.control({ position: "bottomright" });
  legend.onAdd = () => {
    const div = L.DomUtil.create("div", "risk-legend");
    div.innerHTML = `
      <strong>Risk links</strong><br>
      colour = <span id="risk-legend-scale-label">log1p(predicted EB)</span><br>
      width = global risk rank band
      <div class="risk-legend-gradient"></div>
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem">
        <span>lower</span><span>higher</span>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:0.35rem;font-size:0.82rem;color:#405064">
        widest: rank 1-100; normal: rank 5,001+
      </div>
    `;
    legendScaleLabel = div.querySelector("#risk-legend-scale-label");
    return div;
  };
  legend.addTo(map);

  function loadContextLayers() {
    return fetch(CONTEXT_MANIFEST_URL)
      .then((response) => {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`Could not load ${CONTEXT_MANIFEST_URL}`);
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then((manifest) => {
        const files = Array.isArray(manifest.files) ? manifest.files : [];
        const contextFiles = files.filter((entry) => CONTEXT_FAMILIES.has(entry.family));
        return Promise.all(contextFiles.map((entry) => {
          const url = CONTEXT_BASE_URL + entry.filename;
          return fetch(url)
            .then((response) => {
              if (!response.ok) {
                throw new Error(`Could not load ${url}`);
              }
              return response.json();
            })
            .then((geojson) => {
              L.geoJSON(geojson, {
                renderer,
                style: contextStyle,
                interactive: false
              }).addTo(map);
            })
            .catch((error) => {
              console.warn(`Skipping context layer ${url}: ${error.message}`);
            });
        }));
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        console.warn(`Context network unavailable: ${error.message}`);
      });
  }

  Promise.all([
    fetch(DATA_URL).then((response) => {
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Could not load ${DATA_URL}`);
      return response.json();
    }),
    fetch(META_URL).then((response) => {
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Could not load ${META_URL}`);
      return response.json();
    })
  ]).then(([geojson, metadata]) => {
    allFeatures = geojson.features || [];
    const logValues = allFeatures
      .map((feature) => Number(feature.properties.log_predicted_eb))
      .filter(Number.isFinite);
    logMin = Math.min(...logValues);
    logMax = Math.max(...logValues);

    populateFilter(filters.family, allFeatures, "family");
    populateFilter(filters.road_archetype, allFeatures, "road_archetype");
    populateFilter(filters.road_classification, allFeatures, "road_classification");

    Object.values(filters).forEach((select) => select.addEventListener("change", renderLayer));
    resetButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
      Object.values(filters).forEach((select) => { select.value = "__all__"; });
      renderLayer();
    });

    renderCountTable("family-summary", "family", metadata.count_by_family);
    renderCountTable("classification-summary", "road_classification", metadata.count_by_road_classification);
    renderCountTable("archetype-summary", "road_archetype", metadata.count_by_road_archetype);
    renderNumericSummary(metadata.numeric_summary);
    return loadContextLayers().then(renderLayer);
  }).catch((error) => {
    status.textContent = `Map failed to load: ${error.message}`;
    status.style.color = "#9f1d20";
    status.style.background = "#fff4f4";
    console.error(error);
  });
});
</script>
